title: Dharmapuri mango arrivals surge; Bangalore traders bid up Alphonso
summary: Krishnagiri-Dharmapuri belt mango arrivals crossed 600 tonnes a day at wholesale yards on Friday with Bangalore and Hyderabad traders bidding aggressively for Alphonso and Banganapalli.

title: Dharmapuri collector reviews counting day traffic plan
summary: Collector chaired a coordination meeting with police and revenue officers to finalise traffic diversions, parking and result-display arrangements at all five constituency counting centres.

title: Hogenakkal tourist footfall climbs as polling restrictions ease
summary: Hogenakkal Falls saw a sharp jump in weekend visitors after polling-week restrictions on coracle rides were lifted, with the tourism department deploying additional safety staff.

title: Tree falls on bus, traffic hit
summary: A tamarind tree fell on a government bus near Uppalam, damaging the vehicle and blocking Dharmapuri–Palacode road traffic for over two hours.

title: Anbumani slams liquor inaction
summary: PMK leader Anbumani Ramadoss criticised government inaction on illegal liquor shops after villagers attacked outlets in Podur near Pennagaram.

title: Villagers target illicit liquor outlets
summary: Residents vandalised multiple illegal liquor shops in Podur village, exposing long-standing enforcement gaps and triggering fresh police monitoring in the region.

title: Child injured in wall collapse
summary: A three-year-old girl was seriously injured after a damaged school compound wall collapsed in Vellichandai, raising concerns over rural school infrastructure safety.

title: Traffic restored after obstruction
summary: Local residents cleared a fallen tree blocking a key route, restoring normal vehicle movement after hours of disruption in Dharmapuri district.

title: Police increase vigilance
summary: Police intensified monitoring in Pennagaram region following unrest over illicit liquor shops and growing public pressure for strict enforcement actions.

title: Public anger over liquor trade
summary: Continued illegal liquor sales triggered widespread anger among villagers, who demanded stronger government intervention and stricter local enforcement.

title: School safety concerns rise
summary: The wall collapse incident has prompted officials to review structural safety of government school buildings across Dharmapuri district.

title: Bus services briefly disrupted
summary: Government bus services on Dharmapuri–Palacode route were temporarily disrupted following a tree fall incident affecting scheduled trips.

title: Strong winds linked to incident
summary: Strong winds are suspected to have caused the roadside tree collapse, prompting caution for commuters amid unstable weather conditions.

title: Child hospitalised after accident
summary: The injured child from Vellichandai wall collapse was admitted to hospital, with doctors monitoring condition following serious injuries.

title: Villagers assist in clearing road
summary: Local residents took initiative to remove fallen tree debris, helping authorities restore normal traffic flow quickly on a busy route.

title: Probe into illegal liquor expands
summary: Police launched expanded investigation into illicit liquor networks after vandalism incidents exposed long-running illegal operations in rural areas.

title: Opposition criticises enforcement failure
summary: Opposition leaders accused authorities of ignoring repeated complaints about illegal liquor trade, calling for accountability and stronger governance measures.

title: Community protests escalate
summary: Villagers’ direct action against illegal shops signals rising frustration and lack of trust in local enforcement mechanisms.
